fundamentals.name: Datadog, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Datadog, Inc. operates an observability and security platform for cloud applications in the United States and internationally. The company's products comprise infrastructure and application performance monitoring, log management, observability pipelines, synthetics, real user monitoring, product analytics, continuous profiler, database monitoring, data observability, LLM observability, error tracking, network monitoring, incident response, workflow automation and App builder, event management, bits AI SRE, cloud cost management, cloud security, code security, cloud SIEM, threat management, sensitive data scanner, and CI visibility. Datadog, Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: Datadog shows impressive revenue and earnings growth with strong margins, but trades at a very high valuation and has low operating and net profit margins relative to its revenue.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 18.3%; next earnings date is 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 32.2% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 113.4% indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Gross margin of 79.9% is very healthy, suggesting efficient cost of goods sold.
Strong free cash flow of $936.73M TTM provides operational flexibility.
Consensus rating is strong buy with a mean target price slightly above the current spot price.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 559.13 and Forward P/E of 78.62 indicate a very high valuation.
Operating margin of 0.8% and Profit margin of 3.7% are surprisingly low given the high gross margin and revenue growth.
Return on equity of 3.9% and Return on assets of -0.2% suggest inefficient use of capital.
Beta of 1.29 indicates higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: Datadog recently reported its first quarter with over $1 billion in revenue and raised its 2026 outlook, signaling strong performance and growth expectations. This positive momentum has led to Datadog being highlighted as a trending stock and included in a prominent AI ETF by a notable analyst. The company's strong earnings surprise in the last reported quarter further supports this optimistic view.
